name: Completely Stretchy
short_description: A befuddling mishap has made you COMPLETELY STRETCHY! Stretch, swing and stick around the delightfully odd and vibrant Grombi Isles in this eccentric and light-hearted 3D platformer.
detailed_description:
Completely Stretchy is a first-person exploration and 3D platformer set in the strange and wonderful Grombi Isles.

After you and Dr Grimble experience a rough day at the Elektro factory, you find yourself transformed - with a blue, stretchy, and sticky body!? Fellow denizens may be befuddled by your new look, and to make matters worse, the Elektros have escaped containment and are now scattered around the Isles!

Harness your newfound stretchiness to climb, swing and stick across this bizarre world. Track down the hidden Elektros to restore power and unravel the mystery of what happened to you. Why are you so stretchy, and blue?

FEATURES

  • ✨Swing, Climb and Stick: Use your hand to grab onto surfaces and swing across the world, finding hidden items to help you in your endeavours

  • 🖐️ Lend a Hand: Help the quirky and curious inhabitants of the Grombi isles (Scrimbli, Chunkos and more) and get your hand on some stretchy upgrades

  • 🗺️ Reach New Heights: Explore three different regions with unique quests, activities and secrets

  • 🍄 Hands-On Fun: Jump on a hoverbike, dunk a few baskets and discover all you can do

  • 🤔 Sticky Situations: Talking to locals will help you understand more about this strange place

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
